Class WorkspacePageController

java.lang.Object
controller.WorkspacePageController
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICollectionPageListener, IDataPanelListener<Checklist>, IWorkspacePageListener
public class WorkspacePageController extends Object implements IWorkspacePageListener
Controller for the workspace page in the ToDo Master application by implementing the IWorkspacePageListener interface.

It manages operations on the current Workspace, such as renaming the workspace, creating new checklists, clearing all checklists, and handling checklist-specific actions like edit, delete, or selection.

It delegates the navigation between pages to the AppController and relies on dialog classes to gather user input or confirmation before modifying data.

    Displays a dialog to create a new checklist.

    Displays a confirmation dialog to clear all checklists in the workspace.
    void
    onDeleteItemRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
    Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the specified checklist.
    void
    onEditItemRequested(Checklist itemToEdit)
    Displays a dialog allowing the user to rename the given checklist.
    void

    Handles the event when a checklist is selected.
    void
    onRenameTitleRequested()
    Displays a dialog to rename the current workspace.

  • Constructor Details

    • WorkspacePageController

      public WorkspacePageController(IAppNavigator appController, Workspace data, IUserDialogService dialogService)
      Constructs a new WorkspacePageController.
      Parameters:
      appController - the main application controller responsible for navigation; must not be null
      data - the workspace data to be managed; must not be null
      dialogService - the dialog service used for user interactions; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • onRenameTitleRequested

      public void onRenameTitleRequested()
      Displays a dialog to rename the current workspace. Updates the workspace title if the user confirms the action.
      Specified by:
      onRenameTitleRequested in interface ICollectionPageListener

    • onAddNewItemRequested

      public void onAddNewItemRequested()
      Displays a dialog to create a new checklist. Adds the new checklist to the workspace if the user confirms the action.
      Specified by:
      onAddNewItemRequested in interface ICollectionPageListener

    • onClearRequested

      public void onClearRequested()
      Displays a confirmation dialog to clear all checklists in the workspace. Clears the workspace if the user confirms the action.
      Specified by:
      onClearRequested in interface ICollectionPageListener

    • onEditItemRequested

      public void onEditItemRequested(Checklist itemToEdit)
      Displays a dialog allowing the user to rename the given checklist. Updates the checklist title if the user confirms the action.
      Specified by:
      onEditItemRequested in interface IDataPanelListener<Checklist>
      Parameters:
      itemToEdit - the checklist to edit

    • onDeleteItemRequested

      public void onDeleteItemRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
      Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the specified checklist. Removes the checklist if the user confirms the action.
      Specified by:
      onDeleteItemRequested in interface IDataPanelListener<Checklist>
      Parameters:
      listToDelete - the checklist to delete

    • onItemSelected

      public void onItemSelected(Checklist selectedList)
      Handles the event when a checklist is selected. Navigates to the checklist page to display its contents.
      Specified by:
      onItemSelected in interface IDataPanelListener<Checklist>
      Parameters:
      selectedList - the selected checklist
